attributes.description: Node listing with controls-based filtering for cluster and node selection.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name=MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    status = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    mem_pressure = MAX(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure),
    pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    mem_avail = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    cpu_util = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4),
    mem_ws_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, status, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_ws_util, mem_avail, disk_util
| SORT status DESC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name=MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    status = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    mem_pressure = MAX(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure),
    pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    mem_avail = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    cpu_util = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4),
    mem_ws_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, status, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_ws_util, mem_avail, disk_util
| SORT status DESC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
    running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL unhealthy_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, unhealthy_pods

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
    running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL unhealthy_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, unhealthy_pods

embeddableConfig.description: Count of non-running pods per node.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by non-running pods

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, pods

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, pods

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND (k8s.node.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL)
| STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = cpu_usage / alloc_cpu
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, cpu_util

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND (k8s.node.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL)
| STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = cpu_usage / alloc_cpu
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, cpu_util

embeddableConfig.description:
CPU utilization per node: usage / allocatable.

Healthy: < 60% · At risk: 60–80% · Unhealthy: > 80%
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by CPU utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND (k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL)
| STATS mem_ws = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_util = TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, mem_util

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND (k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL)
| STATS mem_ws = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_util = TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, mem_util

embeddableConfig.description:
Memory utilization per node: working set / allocatable.

Healthy: < 60% · At risk: 60–80% · Unhealthy: > 80%
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by memory working set utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), fs_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL disk_util = TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, disk_util

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), fs_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL disk_util = TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, disk_util
